title: Advancements&Rewards
description: A mod that lets the advancements give players bonuses.
body:
### Introduction
This mod allows you to **receive some bonuses after obtaining the advancements**, and almost everything is configurable.This makes advancements more useful and motivates players to complete them.

By default, **for every 5 advancements a player achieves**(10 for the first time), they will receive a reward of **2 points of maximum health, 5% attack damage, and 5% attack speed bonus**.

You can view the current bonuses in the advancement interface.(From top to bottom, they represent health, attack damage, and attack speed)
![View the bonuses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6422fb97d0caac2afb1066960c8e2799f14bfca.png)

#### Configurable:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. The number of advancements required for players to get the first reward(Default: 10)
2. The number of advancements required each time for players to get subsequent rewards(Default: 5)
3. The maximum health bonus that the player will receive each time they get a reward(Default: 2)
4. The attack damage bonus(in percentage) that the player will receive each time they get a reward(Default: 5)
5. The attack speed bonus(in percentage) that the player will receive each time they get a reward(Default: 5)
6. The maximum number of times a player can receive rewards(Default: 10000)

</details>



### Postscript
This mod adds the command _/advancement_reward_, allowing players to set bonuses they own. 

This mod is inspired by [Spice of Life: Carrot Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spice-of-life-carrot-edition)

Mod made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
